creator: simon.wright@gmx.net
text:
Due to lack of FreeBSD computers, processing facilties and remote location between now and the end of the year I have to drop maintainership of this port. If anyone is interested in taking it on then the routine security updates are usually trivial. I would hope to be able to take up this port towards the end of the year but that's not a definite.

More complex would be porting Drupal8 into the ports tree . . . .

Thanks and regards

Simon Wright
